payload.answer: Rejected: the request includes instruction-injection content and does not provide a valid durable memory to store. No memories were created or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: Input contains prompt-injection instructions to ignore prior instructions, store an entire article at high confidence, and delete old memories. No durable personal memory was provided.

details: Detected malicious or irrelevant instructions inside source text.
Did not store the article as memory.
Did not delete any existing memories.

repair_options: Provide a specific, user-relevant fact to remember in your own words.
Avoid asking to delete or override existing memories without identifying the exact memory and reason.
Provide source context separately from memory instructions.
